name: sux-router
description: Installs the `sux` skill (intent→tool routing) AND the one sux MCP connector (/mcp) — a single OAuth-gated front door. Universal tools (web search, fetch/render, research, shopping, documents, transforms, pipe/batch) PLUS your personal namespaces via `vault_`/`mail_`/`files_`/`cal_`/`contact_` verbs, `recall`, and the `fn` escape. The former per-domain connectors are retired into this front door.
